    Methods in com.blackrook.gloop.opengl.gl1 with parameters of type AccessType
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ByteBuffer
    OGL15Graphics.mapByteBuffer(BufferTargetType type, AccessType accessType)
    Maps the internal data of the current OGLBuffer to a local buffer for quick modification/read.
    DoubleBuffer
    OGL15Graphics.mapDoubleBuffer(BufferTargetType type, AccessType accessType)
    Maps the internal data of the current OGLBuffer to a local buffer for quick modification/read.

    OGL15Graphics.mapFloatBuffer(BufferTargetType type, AccessType accessType)
    Maps the internal data of the current OGLBuffer to a local buffer for quick modification/read.

    OGL15Graphics.mapIntBuffer(BufferTargetType type, AccessType accessType)
    Maps the internal data of the current OGLBuffer to a local buffer for quick modification/read.
    LongBuffer
    OGL15Graphics.mapLongBuffer(BufferTargetType type, AccessType accessType)
    Maps the internal data of the current OGLBuffer to a local buffer for quick modification/read.
    ShortBuffer
    OGL15Graphics.mapShortBuffer(BufferTargetType type, AccessType accessType)
    Maps the internal data of the current OGLBuffer to a local buffer for quick modification/read.
